title: Cobblemon QoL
description: Client side quality of life fixes for Cobblemon.
body:
## Cobblemon QoL

Cobblemon QoL is a **client-side** collection of fixes for Cobblemon that targets issues the client can cause in battle formats (especially multi battles), plus a couple of UI improvements that display important info.

### What it does

#### Battles / Multi-Battles 
- Fixes gimmick move responses in double/triple/multi battles.
  - Ensures gimmicks are applied properly when choosing targets in multi battles.
- Moves the Shift button for triple battles.
  - Repositions the Shift button to the **right side** in triples so it doesn't overlap the gimmick button.

#### UI / Summary
- Adds a Tera Type icon overlay to Pokémon portraits (uses official type icons).
  - Renders a small Tera Type icon on the Pokémon portrait.
  - Also renders the icon in the PC Preview screen. 

## Important
- This mod does **not** add any gimmicks.
- The gimmick-related fixes only matter for those with a gimmick mod installed (GenesisForms/Gimme-That-Gimmick).
  - Tested on servers using those mods; it should also work in singleplayer as long as the gimmick mod is installed, but keep in mind this is only relevant for doubles/triples/multi battles, which is unlikely to be useful if you're on singleplayer.
- Without a gimmick mod, you will only see the UI changes.
